evidence_summary: Establish the logistical burden of Martian survival through the heavy, systematic movement of biological assets. The transition from ceremony to labor must feel physically taxing and strictly regulated to emphasize resource scarcity.

Following the ceremony, warriors begin the heavy labor of transporting eggs from subterranean vaults to the incubator to prepare for the next five-year incubation cycle. This demonstrates the biological selection process and resource regulation.
Ritualistic high $\rightarrow$ Laborious/Systematic duty.
Post-ceremony atmosphere shifting into heavy physical movement within dark vaults.
Eggs secured within the incubator enclosure after transport.
Systematic transport of eggs from subterranean storage to incubation.
